title: Fukuoka City Subway 1000 and 2000 Series | 福岡市交通局1000・2000系
description: Fukuoka City Subway 1000 and 2000 series trains for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
The Fukuoka City Subway 1000 and 2000 series trains are narrow gauge DC electric multiple units that operate on the Kuko (Airport) and Hakozaki Lines of the Fukuoka City Subway network and on the JR Kyushu Chikuhi Line to Chikuzen-Maebaru. The 1000 series entered service in 1981 and was refurbished from 1997-2004, and the 2000 series entered service in 1993 and refurbished from 2015-2017.

This pack adds these trains to Minecraft Transit Railway as retextures of the mod's default Eidan (Tokyo Metro) 9000 series train.

Minecraft Transit Railway is required for this pack.

Contents:

- Fukuoka Subway 1000 Series (regular and mini variants)
- Fukuoka Subway 2000 Series (regular and mini variants)
